tasks.label: Tithe PWA: Open Chrome (.env URL)
tasks.command: PORT=$(node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const env=fs.existsSync('.env')?fs.readFileSync('.env','utf8'):''; const read=(k)=>{const m=env.match(new RegExp('^'+k+'=(.*)$','m')); return m?m[1].trim().replace(/^['\"]|['\"]$/g,''):'';}; const p=read('PWA_PORT')||read('VITE_PWA_PORT')||'5173'; process.stdout.write(p);") && URL="http://localhost:${PORT}" && open -na "Google Chrome" --args --remote-debugging-port=9222 --user-data-dir=/tmp/chrome-debug-tithe "$URL"
